In Yummy Drop, you control exactly how and where the treats fall. It is a relaxing puzzle game designed to test your timing and aim. Your main goal is simple: catch the falling food securely. You need to figure out the right angle to make the perfect drop. If the ingredient misses the bowl, you just try the puzzle again.

How to play:
• Swipe left or right to move the ingredient across the screen.
• Adjust the starting angle of the food before letting go.
• Tap to release and watch the food drop.
• Catch the treat in the bowl to clear the level!

top_apps.name: Happy Arrow Rush
top_apps.description_short: Guide arrows forward, avoid obstacles, and clear each path.
top_apps.description_excerpt:
Happy Arrow Rush gives you just enough time to think — then it forces you to commit.

Every board is covered in arrows. Tap to rotate them until they point to open space and fly off. The controls could not be simpler. The catch is that you are racing a countdown, and every wrong tap costs you. Make too many mistakes and the level ends on the spot.

Early boards ease you in with a forgiving clock and plenty of breathing room. Later levels squeeze both your time and your mistake limit until you are planning three moves ahead while the seconds drop. The puzzles are handcrafted, so the difficulty ramp feels fair instead of randomly punishing.

If you want a puzzle game that stays gentle at first but actually tests your nerves later, this one is worth a try.
